field.label: Enable SIEM Logger
field.help: Enable the SIEM Logger service for event collection and export

field.label: Log Level
field.help: Set the verbosity level for SIEM Logger logging. Higher levels provide more detail but consume more storage.

field.label: Maximum Log Size (MB)
field.help: Maximum size for log files in megabytes (10-1000 MB)

field.label: Log Retention Days
field.help: Number of days to retain logs (1-365 days)
